message:
🌱 Add litellm: [Bug]: ImportError with openai 1.100 mission (#1191)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,79 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "litellm-13710-bug-importerror-with-openai-1-100",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "litellm: [Bug]: ImportError with openai 1.100",
+    "description": "[Bug]: ImportError with openai 1.100. This issue affects 22+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify litellm troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your litellm deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n litellm -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm -n litellm --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review litellm configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant litellm configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n litellm -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm\nkubectl get configmap -n litellm -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=litellm\n```\n### What happened?\n\nAbout an hour ago, [openai 1.100](https://pypi.org/project/openai/1.100.0/) was released. This causes an ImportError in LiteLLM's OpenAI integration."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [Bug]: ImportError with openai 1.100",
+        "description": "## Update OpenAI dependency to version 1.100.0 and refactor response configuration types for consistency\n\n## Relevant issues\r\n\n## Pre-Submission checklist\n\n**Please complete all items before asking a LiteLLM maintainer to review your PR**\r\r\n\n## Type\n\n🚄 Infrastructure\n\n## Changes\n```yaml\nTraceback (most recent call last):\n[...]\n  File \".../litellm/litellm_core_utils/logging_utils.py\", line 7, in <module>\n    from litellm.types.utils import (\n  File \".../litellm/types/utils.py\", line 42, in <module>\n    from ..litellm_core_utils.core_helpers import map_finish_reason\n  File \".../litellm/litellm_core_utils/core_helpers.py\", line 8, in <module>\n    from litellm.types.llms.openai import AllMessageValues\n  File \".../litellm/types/llms/openai.py\", line 36, in <module>\n    from openai.types.responses.response import (\nImportError: cannot import name 'ResponseTextConfig' from 'openai.t\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade litellm to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade litellm:\n```bash\nhelm repo update\nhelm upgrade litellm litellm/litellm --namespace litellm\n```\nVerify the upgrade:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n litellm\nhelm list -n litellm\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm [Bug]: ImportError with openai 1.100 is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm -n litellm --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n litellm --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "## Update OpenAI dependency to version 1.100.0 and refactor response configuration types for consistency\n\n## Relevant issues\r\n\n## Pre-Submission checklist\n\n**Please complete all items before asking a LiteLLM maintainer to review your PR**\r\r\n\n## Type\n\n🚄 Infrastructure\n\n## Changes",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "Traceback (most recent call last):\n[...]\n  File \".../litellm/litellm_core_utils/logging_utils.py\", line 7, in <module>\n    from litellm.types.utils import (\n  File \".../litellm/types/utils.py\", line 42, in <module>\n    from ..litellm_core_utils.core_helpers import map_finish_reason\n  File \".../litellm/litellm_core_utils/core_helpers.py\", line 8, in <module>\n    from litellm.types.llms.openai import AllMessageValues\n  File \".../litellm/types/llms/openai.py\", line 36, in <module>\n    from openai.types.responses.response import (\nImportError: cannot import name 'ResponseTextConfig' from 'openai.types.responses.response' (.../openai/types/responses/response.py). Did you mean: 'ResponseFormatTextConfig'?"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "litellm",
+      "community",
+      "llm-gateway",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],

+    },

+  },
